// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : JINDAL SHADEED IRON AND STEEL LLC OMAN // STEEL REBAR, 4,825 MT +5% CHOPT // SOHAR - S. AFRICE // LAYCAN : 10 - 20 DEC’25
Good Eve !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Please see the below order and
please submit the best offer by December 03, 1500 Hrs Oman Time
along with vessel particulars, clean holds photos, Baltic questionnaire, pre stowage plan, the cargo will be finalized accordingly This cargo will be finalized on December 4/5
ACCT :
JINDAL SHADEED IRON AND STEEL LLC OMAN
CARGO
:
Steel Rebar in Bundles of 10-12 meter length and 2 T weight
QUANTITY :
4825 +/5% CHOPT,
LAYCAN : 10 - 20 December 2025
LOAD PORT : 1 SP 1/2 SB Sohar
DISCHARGE PORT : 1 SP GSPAAAA 1 SB Durban or Richards Bay South Africa
LOAD RATE : ,
LR 3000/4000/5000   MT PWWD FHINC in CHOPT
DISCHARGE RATE : As fast as vessel can on liner out basis,
NILL ADDCOMM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
Free In- Liner Out
LSD Owner\'s Account
PDA Bends Owners Account
Quay Wall Charges at load port on Charterers account
TT 12 Hrs EIU at load port
One berth to berth shifting at load port will be on owners account
Clean BL Required,
Looking for Open Hatch Box Type Vessel preferably , in case of the vessel with coaming, the loading will be done in hatch square only, there is no forklift operations at load port.
Full Terms attached, owners has to confirm /comment on the full terms
Note- In case of Part Cargo , owners to mention the Port Of Rotation, Pre Stowage Plan showing Combination Cargo and our cargo,
Vessel Age- Max 25 years
Agent @ Sohar as below
KHIMJI RAMDAS SHIPPING LLC,
P.O. BOX NO. 1,9 POSTAL CODE - 322, FELAJ AL QABAIL,
SOHAR, SULTANATE OF OMAN.
